mechanism: Engineer contact is a resource-level tag; owner contact is a subscription-level tag. Azure Policy assigns per-key enforcement for each tag. Values derived from the application profile.
why: Without policy-enforced tags, ownership relies on manual discipline — tags drift, go missing on out-of-pipeline resources, and incident routing fails. Policy + profile derivation makes drift self-correcting.

related.note: Owner and engineer values derived from the profile.
Nightly tag remediation runs as a Container App Job.

violations: Tag value with characters Azure Policy match conditions can't evaluate — enforcement silently fails.
Landing zone without tag policy assignments.
Owner contact as resource-level tag instead of subscription-level.
Automation identity missing write permission on tags — remediation can't apply corrections.
